fishbone "Spacious density — presentation slide"
effect "Customer churn spike"

config density = spacious

category product  "Product"
category support  "Support"
category pricing  "Pricing"
category competitor "Competitor"

product   : "Core feature regression"
product   : "Onboarding friction"
support   : "Ticket SLA missed"
support   : "Knowledge base stale"
pricing   : "Recent price hike"
pricing   : "Annual discount removed"
competitor: "New entrant with AI feature"
competitor: "Free tier expansion"
